About Us

WE HUSTLE SO
YOU DON'T HAVE TO

Express Movers & Hauling was built on a single promise: moving labor you can actually trust. We show up on time, handle your belongings with care, and get the job done right — every single time.

Whether you're moving across the street or across the city, need a single sofa relocated or an entire home packed and loaded, our team brings the same energy, professionalism, and hustle to every job.

We believe great moving service should be fast, reliable, and affordable — no hidden fees, no excuses, no mess.

"JUST BUST A MOVE"
— The Express Way
  • Experienced, professional moving crew
  • Careful handling of all furniture & items
  • Transparent, affordable pricing
  • Same-day service when available
  • No job too big or too small
"

We hustle so you don't have to. That's not just a tagline — that's our entire operation.

— Express Movers & Hauling

FAQ

GOT
QUESTIONS?

Here are the most common questions we get. Don't see yours? Call or text us directly and we'll answer anything.

Call Now
Do you offer same-day moving service? +
Yes! Same-day service is available when our schedule allows. The earlier you call, the better our chances of making it work. Text or call 470-464-6273 to check availability for today.
How much does it cost to hire Express Movers? +
We offer affordable rates with no hidden fees. Pricing depends on the scope of your move — number of items, distance, and services needed. Call or fill out our quote form and we'll give you a clear, honest price upfront.
Do you handle furniture assembly or disassembly? +
Call us to discuss — our team is capable and we do our best to assist with all aspects of your move. We'll let you know what we can do for your specific situation.
Do I need to provide my own moving truck? +
We are a moving labor company, so in many cases you would provide the truck or container (U-Haul, PODS, etc.) and we provide the muscle. Contact us to discuss your specific situation and we'll find the best solution.
How far in advance do I need to book? +
The sooner the better, but we accept last-minute bookings and same-day requests subject to availability. Don't hesitate to call even if your move is today — we'll do our best to fit you in.
Is no job really too big or too small? +
Absolutely. We've helped customers move a single couch and we've handled full home relocations. Whatever your moving needs are, we're here to help. Affordable rates apply to all job sizes.
